title: Indian MSMEs Set to Be Global Disruptors in Textiles, Clothing, Electrical Equipment Sectors

summary.about: A brief report notice highlighting export-growth opportunities for Indian MSMEs.
summary.audience: Indian MSME owners, exporters and industrial-development agencies.
summary.method: The Infisum page summarizes an external report; it does not provide enough detail to verify the underlying method.
summary.insights: The cited report projects export growth above 60% by 2027 for several product groups, including wood, hides, rubber, plastics and food.
